title: SpyFu - Competitor Keyword Research Tools for Google Ads PPC & SEO

paragraphs: Competitors answer questions you don't. We fill the gaps for you.
Proven results in 6 days.
Real Customer Results
Even if your first question is "What should I do?" - SpyFu GPT takes it from there, turning uncertainty into action.
Learn from their mistakes without suffering them yourself.
Take their biggest wins and build on top of them.
Watch your site grow. Monitor traffic, clicks, impressions, keyword rankings, ad performance.
Updated every 15 minutes.
Live SEO & PPC intelligence, refreshed every 15 seconds.
with advanced metrics
Customize your stack and automate exports with fast, documented endpoints.
Proof that competitive intel, PPC History, and keyword research can be both powerful and easy to use.
Search for a competitor. Download their PPC keywords. It's that simple. No download limits. See how many clicks they get and how much they pay for each keyword.
Keep track of every domain bidding on your Google Ads. Catch changes in ad spend over time. Watch out for emerging competitors and shifts in strategy.
Type in your domain, and we'll show you the core keywords that your top Google Ads competitors buy but you don't.
Enter YOUR website. We analyze all your competitors' Google Ads bidding history and recommend the most profitable keywords you're not already buying.
Browse your competitor's complete Google Ads campaign history. See the results of every ad split test they've ever run and the early keywords that didn't work out.
Wasting money on Google Ads? Scan your account for costly overly-broad keyword matches that your competitors already tried and failed.
Track your ranking progress and impression share on your most important keyword groups. We'll suggest expansion keywords and actions to take. Try it free.
Search for a competitor. Download their SEO keywords. It's that simple. See what they rank on and how many clicks they get.
Keep track of every website in your SEO niche. Catch changes in rankings and content over time. Watch out for emerging competitors.
Type in your domain to get instant insight into the most important keywords you aren't ranking for, but your competitors are.
Trace the ranking history of any page or website on a keyword. Discover the algorithm change or site optimization that caused their rise or fall.
Custom branded SEO reports designed to land and retain clients. Prove your value > Highlight opportunities > Show competitor action.
Find out which backlinks do your competitors have that you don't. See the exact links that let them outrank you on a specific keyword.
Target the influencers whose links will help you rank on a specific keyword with a custom audience on Facebook or Twitter. Or build a relationship directly.
Track your ranking progress and impression share on your most important keyword groups. We'll suggest expansion keywords and actions to take.
Generate targeted keyword ideas. Filter by search volume, cpc, SEO difficulty, number of advertisers, click-through rate, more.
Paste in a list of keywords and we'll organize them into groups and add search volume and CPC data to them.
Learn the secret tricks of the most successful advertisers for any keyword. See the results of every ad test ever run. Take the successes, avoid the mistakes.
Type in a keyword, see the most profitable keywords in that niche. It's that simple. Everything we know about competitor-driven Google Ads research in one click.
Enter a keyword and see the sites and backlinks that help you rank on that keyword. SpyFu backlink recommendations are 100% safe and actively indexed by Google.
Big lessons in deep SERP analysis: Find specific ranking factors for each keyword. Uncover the weak sites that manage to rank anyway and learn their secret.
Trace the ranking history of any page or website on a keyword. Discover the algorithm change or site optimization that caused their rise or fall.
We sorted 50 million+ websites into lists like Top Advertisers by State and City. Drill in by SEO traffic, social media and more.
Our keyword metrics come directly from Google Keyword Planner and we created lists of the highest CPC and search volume keywords.
This feature is coming soon. We're actively building it and will make it available here when it's ready.
